items.title: Railway Board likely to give approval for CMRL takeover of MRTS in four to six weeks
items.summary: Sources said a joint proposal was sent to the board recently and no further delay is expected; the MoU between Southern Railway and State government will be signed after the approval is granted

items.summary: The Commissioner also reviewed desilting operations being carried out using an amphibious machine in Korattur North Avenue Road and along the surplus water canal connected to Korattur Lake

items.summary: The MEMU train, which runs with eight cars now, should be operated with 12 cars in view of the high occupancy in both directions, say commuters

items.title: Fishermen in Nagapattinam ready to set sail as fishing ban ends
items.summary: The annual fishing ban, which began on April 15, ended on Sunday;  fishermen utilised the ban period for maintenance and painting of their boats and are now raring to venture into the sea

items.title: Poor sanitation conditions worry Varaganeri residents
items.summary: A channel near the Sri Elan Kaliamman Temple is choked with silt, weeds and garbage, obstructing the free flow of water and heaps of waste can be seen on the roadside

items.title: The murals that united a neighbourhood in Chennai
items.summary: Over two decades after artist Kamla Ravikumar painted the walls of a park in Kalakshetra Colony in 2003, she found her work damaged; she painted the six walls over several months with the help of the neighbourhood children, their parents, students of Stella Maris College, and professional artists

items.title: VGP Marine Kingdom releases captive-bred banded bamboo sharks into ocean
items.summary: While this is the first experiment of its kind, the aquarium hopes to expand to other marine species over time, says  S Arockia Cinnakan aka Kannan, the institution’s head curator

items.title: Chennai workshops revive repair culture amid growing textile waste concerns
items.summary: As a two-day garment mending workshop by Samposhan ends today, a close look at Chennai’s repair culture provides cause for some celebration and also reasons to revitalise efforts to promote it

items.title: Rooting for green cooling solutions
items.summary: Chennai cannot do without air-conditioners, but their run time can be reduced if one designed their living space green and topped it with soft furnishings that have the visible imprint of nature. Here are roadside conversations with makers of bamboo and vetiver curtains

items.title: Opening of Chennai airport’s second cab pick-up point deferred again
items.summary: Airport Director says the project faces some legal issues and it is being taken up with caution to protect the interest of the public; a trial run for free flow of traffic will be initiated and a study will be taken up

items.title: CBSE Class 9 students in Chennai yet to get textbooks for this year
items.summary: Some schools have received their English and Science textbooks while most have not received their subject books; an NCERT book supplier says the situation will likely ease by next week
